subject: Re: (no subject)
body:
tender as much aspossible without ubti
--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Just called FTC's office to see if you are doing ok,
> but you just  left.  
> Things are fine in the NY office.  No negative
> sentiment; only  concern for your 
> well being, for what it is worth.  Try to have a
> good  weekend.  I will be 
> here in office until 5:30 PM.  Reach me on Cell 
> Phone this weekend any time.
>  
> FYI
>  
> Community Interests owns 190,000 shares of Microsoft
> Common Stock with a  
> cost basis of $15.151 per share or $2,878,700.
>  
> Microsoft has given notice of a tender offer to
> purchase up to 808,080,808  
> shares of its common stock for not greater than
> $24.75 per share and not less  
> than $22.50 per share.  The Tender Office expires on
> August 17, 2006,  unless 
> extended.
>  
> Harry is currently working up projections from
> Hyperion Capital Partners to  
> determine the extent of any potential UBTI problems
> and I will let you know 
> that  information when I get it from Harry
>  
> Darren K.  Indyke
> Attorney-At-Law
> 457 Madison Avenue
> 4th Floor
> New York, New  York 10022
> Tel: 212-750-1176
> Fax: 212-750-0381
> e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com) 
> 
>

body_html:
tender as much aspossible without ubti
--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Just called FTC's office to see if you are doing ok,
but you just left.
Things are fine in the NY office. No negative
sentiment; only concern for your
well being, for what it is worth. Try to have a
good weekend. I will be
here in office until 5:30 PM. Reach me on Cell
Phone this weekend any time.

FYI

Community Interests owns 190,000 shares of Microsoft
Common Stock with a
cost basis of $15.151 per share or $2,878,700.

Microsoft has given notice of a tender offer to
purchase up to 808,080,808
shares of its common stock for not greater than
$24.75 per share and not less
than $22.50 per share. The Tender Office expires on
August 17, 2006, unless
extended.

Harry is currently working up projections from
Hyperion Capital Partners to
determine the extent of any potential UBTI problems
and I will let you know
that information when I get it from Harry

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)
